            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    private fun mergeConnectionsByHost(connections: List\u003cConnection\u003e): List\u003cConnection\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "        val byHost = connections.groupBy { it.metadata?.host?.takeIf { h -\u003e h.isNotEmpty() } ?: it.id }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "        return byHost.values.map { group -\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "            val first = group.first()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "            val upload = group.sumOf { it.upload }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "            val download = group.sumOf { it.download }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "            val latest = group.maxByOrNull { it.start } ?: first"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "            first.copy(upload = upload, download = download, start = latest.start)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "// 代理选择 Hook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "export const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  const { verge } = useVerge();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  const { onSuccess, onError, onRefreshSelectedNodeOnly, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  // 缓存"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  const config = useMemo("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    () =\u003e ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "      enableConnectionCleanup,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    }),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  // 切换节点：先等核心与 profile 同步完成，再刷新代理列表，避免过早刷新拿到旧 now 导致界面「选不上」"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  const changeProxy = useCallback("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    async ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      groupName: string,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "      proxyName: string,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      previousProxy?: string,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    ) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      const timestamp = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      // 标记手动选择节点，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      markManualProxySelectionStarted();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        if (!current || skipConfigSave) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "          return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        if (index \u003c 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "        } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        await patchCurrent({ selected });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "      };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "      // 先完成核心切换与 profile 写入，再延迟刷新代理列表，等核心写好 group.now 后再拉取，避免 UI 不更新选中/图钉"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "      const delayMs = 400;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "      const delayMs2 = 900;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "      const delayMs3 = 1800;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "      Promise.all(["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName).then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": ";"
          }

            "text": "          const runRefresh = (label: string, delay: number) =\u003e {"

            "text": "          // 仅刷新当前选中节点延迟（不触发全量 refreshProxy），若未提供则走全量刷新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "          const runRefreshSelectedNodeOnly = (label: string, t: number) =\u003e {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "            debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] ${label} 仅刷新选中节点延迟&#96;);"

          {

            "text": "            if (onRefreshSelectedNodeOnly) {"

          },
          {

          },

            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "          };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "          setTimeout(() =\u003e runRefresh(\"首次\", delayMs), delayMs);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "          setTimeout(() =\u003e runRefresh(\"二次\", delayMs2), delayMs2);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "          setTimeout(() =\u003e runRefresh(\"三次(兜底)\", delayMs3), delayMs3);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "          // 选择后 3.5s 时查询一次：若提供 onRefreshSelectedNodeOnly 则只刷新当前节点延迟，否则全量刷新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "          setTimeout("
          },

            "lineNumber": 135,

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

            "text": "    },"
          },

            "lineNumber": 158,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "const handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      for (const group of groups) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        for (const proxy of group.all) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "          if (!proxyName) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "          // 检查该节点是否连接成功"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "          if (delayUpdate) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "            if ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "              delay \u003c= 1e5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "            ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "              debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "              );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "              break;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "          }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "export const useFallbackSwitchNotify = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "      // 检测到节点切换"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "        debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        // 仅当「核心当前节点」与 profile 里该组的手动选择不一致时，才清空该组手动选择（避免用户刚选上就被刷新清掉图钉）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        const selectedNow = current?.selected?.find("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "          (s: { name?: string }) =\u003e s.name === groupName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "        )?.now;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        if (selectedNow === currentNow) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "          // 本次切换就是用户手动选择生效，不要清空"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "          debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "            &#96;[FallbackNotify] 切换与 profile 一致，保留手动选择: ${groupName} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "          );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        } else if (current) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "          const selected = current.selected ?? [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "          const next = selected.filter((s: { name?: string }) =\u003e s.name !== groupName);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "          if (next.length !== selected.length) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "            patchCurrent({ selected: next })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "              .then(() =\u003e mutateProfiles())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "              .catch(() =\u003e {});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "          }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        // 检查是否在冷却期内（仅用于是否弹通知，不影响上面同步）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "          debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "const ConnectionsPage = () =\u003e {"

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {

            "text": "  const [setting, setSetting] = useConnectionSetting();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "  /** 仅统计非直连（未走 DIRECT）的流量 */"

          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "  const nonDirectTraffic = useMemo(() =\u003e {"

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    return { download, upload };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "  }, [connections?.activeConnections, connections?.closedConnections]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  const handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = useCallback(async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    // 标记关闭连接开始，在此后 10 秒内禁用 fallback 切换通知"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    markCloseConnectionsStarted();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      if (!proxiesData?.groups) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        debugLog(\"[CloseAll] No proxy groups available, closing connections directly (excluding DIRECT)\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        await closeConnectionsExcludingDirect();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "      debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] Starting delay checks for ${proxiesData.groups.length} groups&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      const groups = proxiesData.groups;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      // Get all proxies and providers from all groups"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "      const allProxyNames: string[] = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "      const allProviders = new Set\u003cstring\u003e();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "      groups.forEach((group: IProxyGroupItem) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        if (group.all) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          group.all.forEach((proxy: IProxyItem | string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "            if (!proxyName) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "            const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "            if (proxyRecord?.provider) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "              allProviders.add(proxyRecord.provider);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "            } else if (proxyName !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 proxyName !== \"REJECT\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "              allProxyNames.push(proxyName);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "          });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "      });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "      debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "        &#96;[CloseAll] Found ${allProxyNames.length} proxies and ${allProviders.size} providers&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      // Check provider delays"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      if (allProviders.size \u003e 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] Checking delays for ${allProviders.size} providers&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        await Promise.allSettled("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "          [...allProviders].map((provider) =\u003e healthcheckProxyProvider(provider)),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      // Check delays for each group - 串行执行避免并发过高"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      let firstGroupName: string | null = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      for (let groupIndex = 0; groupIndex \u003c groups.length; groupIndex++) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        const group = groups[groupIndex];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": ";"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package statistic"

          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "var DefaultManager *Manager"

            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "func init() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tDefaultManager = \u0026Manager{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\t\tuploadTemp:    atomic.NewInt64(0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\t\tdownloadTemp:  atomic.NewInt64(0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\t\tuploadBlip:    atomic.NewInt64(0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\t\tdownloadBlip:  atomic.NewInt64(0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\tuploadTotal:   atomic.NewInt64(0),"
          },

            "text": "\t\tdownloadTotal: atomic.NewInt64(0),"
          },

            "text": "\t}"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tgo DefaultManager.handle()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "type Manager struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tconnections   xsync.Map[string, Tracker]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tuploadTemp    atomic.Int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tdownloadTemp  atomic.Int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tuploadBlip    atomic.Int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tdownloadBlip  atomic.Int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tuploadTotal   atomic.Int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tdownloadTotal atomic.Int64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tpid           int32"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tmemory        uint64"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "func (m *Manager) Join(c Tracker) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tm.connections.Store(c.ID(), c)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func (m *Manager) Leave(c Tracker) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tm.connections.Delete(c.ID())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "func (m *Manager) Get(id string) (c Tracker) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tif value, ok := m.connections.Load(id); ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\tc = value"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "func (m *Manager) Range(f func(c Tracker) bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\tm.connections.Range(func(key string, value Tracker) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\treturn f(value)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "// CloseConnectionsExcludingDirect closes all tracked connections whose chain does not contain DIRECT,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "// so traffic is re-established with the new node (e.g. after fallback group health check)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "func (m *Manager) CloseConnectionsExcludingDirect() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\tvar toClose []string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\tm.Range(func(c Tracker) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t\tinfo := c.Info()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\t\tif info == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\thasDirect := false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, name := range info.Chain {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t\t\tif name == \"DIRECT\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thasDirect = true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\tif !hasDirect {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\t\t\ttoClose = append(toClose, c.ID())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\t\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\tfor _, id := range toClose {"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "const mergeConnectionSnapshot = ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  payload: IConnections,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  previous: ConnectionMonitorData = initConnData,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "): ConnectionMonitorData =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "  const nextConnections = payload.connections ?? [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "  const previousActive = previous.activeConnections ?? [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  const nextById = new Map(nextConnections.map((conn) =\u003e [conn.id, conn]));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "  const now = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  // Register process name to path mappings for log icon display"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  nextConnections.forEach((conn) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    const { process, processPath } = conn.metadata;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    if (process \u0026\u0026 processPath) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      registerProcessPath(process, processPath);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  const newIds = new Set(nextConnections.map((conn) =\u003e conn.id));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  // Keep surviving connections in their previous relative order to reduce row reshuffle,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  // but constrain the array to the incoming snapshot length."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  const carried = previousActive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    .map((prev) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      const next = nextById.get(prev.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "      if (!next) return null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "      nextById.delete(prev.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "      return {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "        ...next,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        curUpload: next.upload - prev.upload,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        curDownload: next.download - prev.download,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "      } as IConnectionsItem;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    .filter(Boolean) as IConnectionsItem[];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "  const newcomers = nextConnections"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    .filter((conn) =\u003e nextById.has(conn.id))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    .map((conn) =\u003e ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "      ...conn,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "      curUpload: 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "      curDownload: 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    }));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "  const activeConnections = [...carried, ...newcomers];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "  const newlyClosed = previousActive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    .filter((conn) =\u003e !newIds.has(conn.id))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    .map((conn) =\u003e ({ ...conn, closedAt: now } as IConnectionsItem));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "  // 持久化与内存中均按 24 小时保留；展示时由连接页按用户设置（1/3/8/24h）再过滤"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  const closedConnections = filterClosedConnectionsByRetention("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    [...(previous.closedConnections ?? []), ...newlyClosed],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    PERSIST_RETENTION_HOURS,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "  void setClosedConnectionsInStorage(closedConnections);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "  return {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    uploadTotal: payload.uploadTotal ?? 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": ";"
          }

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { invoke } from \"@tauri-apps/api/core\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import { useProfiles } from \"@/hooks/use-profiles\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "// 关闭连接操作的时间戳（此后一段时间内不发送 fallback 切换通知）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "let closeConnectionsTimestamp = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// TUN/系统代理模式切换的时间戳"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "let proxyModeChangeTimestamp = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// 手动测速操作的时间戳"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "let manualDelayCheckTimestamp = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// 手动选择节点操作的时间戳"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "let manualProxySelectionTimestamp = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "// 关闭连接后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "const CLOSE_CONNECTIONS_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "// TUN/系统代理模式切换后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "const PROXY_MODE_CHANGE_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 60000; // 1分钟"
          },

            "text": "      debugLog("
          },

            "text": "        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 测试URL: ${url}, 超时: ${timeout}ms, 节点数: ${proxyNames.length}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 766,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 767
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 768,
            "text": "      try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 769,
            "text": "        const tList = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 770,
            "text": "        // 全局模式仅用 checkListDelay，不跑 delayGroup。电脑端与安卓端使用相同核心（本仓库 mihomo）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 771,
            "text": "        // 规则模式：GET /group/Proxy/delay 的组内节点数通常几十，核内 group.URLTest() 并行即可快速返回。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 772,
            "text": "        // 全局模式：GLOBAL 的 GetProxies 返回所有一级组/全部叶子，一次 GET /group/GLOBAL/delay 会触发对「全部节点」"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 773,
            "text": "        // 的并行 URLTest，并发量远大于单组，易拖慢整次请求；安卓测速走 HealthCheck，provider 内 SetLimit(30)。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 774,
            "text": "        // 故全局只跑 checkListDelay（约 30 并发单节点），与安卓体感一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 775,
            "text": "        if (isGlobalMode) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 776,
            "text": "          await delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, groupName, timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 777,
            "text": "        } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 778,
            "text": "          await Promise.race(["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 779,
            "text": "            delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, groupName, timeout),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 780,
            "text": "            delayGroup(groupName, url, timeout),"

            "text": "        }"

          {
            "lineNumber": 783,
            "text": "        debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 784,
            "text": "          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] checkListDelay/delayGroup 耗时: ${Date.now() - tList}ms, 组: ${groupName}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 785,
            "text": "        );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 786,
            "text": "        debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 787,
            "text": "          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 测速总耗时: ${Date.now() - t0}ms&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 788,
            "text": "        );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 789,
            "text": "      } catch (error) {"
          },
          {

            "text": "        console.error("

            "text": "          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 延迟测试出错，组: ${groupName}&#96;,"

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "const handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      for (const group of groups) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        for (const proxy of group.all) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "          if (!proxyName) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "          // 检查该节点是否连接成功"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "          if (delayUpdate) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "            if ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "              delay \u003c= 1e5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "            ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "              debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "              );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "              break;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "          }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": ";"
          }

            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "                        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "                        is ProxyDesign.Request.Select -\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "                            withClash {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "                                patchSelector(names[it.index], it.name)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {

            "text": "                            design.requestRedrawVisible()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "                            // 切换节点后重新拉取该组数据，使界面上的延迟等字段与 core 同步更新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "                            launch {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "                                val idx = it.index"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "                                suspend fun reloadGroup() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "                                    val g = reloadLock.withPermit {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "                                        withClash {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "                                            queryProxyGroup(names[idx], uiStore.proxySort)"
          },
          {

            "text": "                                        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "                                    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "                                    val st = states[idx]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "                                    st.now = g.now"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "                                    st.nowIsManual = g.nowIsManual"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "                                    design.updateGroup("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "                                        idx,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "                                        g.proxies,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "                                        g.type == Proxy.Type.Selector ||"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "                                            g.type == Proxy.Type.Fallback ||"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "                                            g.type == Proxy.Type.URLTest,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "                                        st,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "                                        unorderedStates"
          },
          {

            "text": "                                    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "                                }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "                                reloadGroup()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "  ): Promise\u003cDelayUpdate\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "    debugLog("
          },

            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "      &#96;[DelayManager] 开始测试延迟，代理: ${name}, 组: ${group}, 超时: ${timeout}ms&#96;,"

          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "    );"

          {
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "    const silent = options?.silentGlobal ?? false;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "    // 先将状态设置为测试中"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "    this.setDelay(name, group, -2, { silentGlobal: silent });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "    // 同名节点在其他组已有测速结果则复用，减少对核心的重复请求（如 GLOBAL 与规则组共用同一批节点）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "    const reusable = this.getReusableDelayForName(name, group);"

          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "    if (reusable != null) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 复用延迟，代理: ${name}, 组: ${group}, 延迟: ${reusable.delay}ms&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "      return this.setDelay(name, group, reusable.delay, { elapsed: 0, silentGlobal: silent });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "    let delay = -1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "    let elapsed = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "    const startTime = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "      const url = this.getUrl(group);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 调用API测试延迟，代理: ${name}, URL: ${url}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "      // 设置超时处理, delay = 0 为超时"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "      const timeoutPromise = new Promise\u003cProxyDelay\u003e((resolve) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "        setTimeout(() =\u003e resolve({ delay: 0 }), timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "      });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "      // 使用Promise.race来实现超时控制"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "      const result = await Promise.race(["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "        delayProxyByName(name, url, timeout),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "        timeoutPromise,"
          },

            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "      ]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "      const elapsedTime = Date.now() - startTime;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "      delay = result.delay;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "      elapsed = elapsedTime;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "      debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "        &#96;[DelayManager] API返回 代理:${name} 组:${group} 延迟:${delay}ms 耗时:${elapsedTime}ms timeout:${timeout}ms&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "    } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "      console.error(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试出错，代理: ${name}&#96;, error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "      delay = 1e6; // error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "      elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "    return this.setDelay(name, group, delay,"

            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {

          {

            "lineNumber": 392
          },

          {

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "        if (index \u003e 1) {"
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "// 代理选择 Hook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "export const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  const { verge } = useVerge();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  const { onSuccess, onError, onRefreshSelectedNodeOnly, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;"

          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  // 缓存"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  const config = useMemo("

          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    () =\u003e ({"

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  // 切换节点：先等核心与 profile 同步完成，再刷新代理列表，避免过早刷新拿到旧 now 导致界面「选不上」"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  const changeProxy = useCallback("

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    ) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      const timestamp = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      // 标记手动选择节点，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      markManualProxySelectionStarted();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        if (!current || skipConfigSave) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "          return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        if (index \u003c 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "        } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        await patchCurrent({ selected });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "      };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "      // 先完成核心切换与 profile 写入，再延迟刷新代理列表，等核心写好 group.now 后再拉取，避免 UI 不更新选中/图钉"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "      const delayMs = 400;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "      const delayMs2 = 900;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "      const delayMs3 = 1800;"

          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "      Promise.all(["

          {

          },

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "export const useRenderList = "

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "  // 链式代理模式节点自动计算延迟"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"

          {

            "text": "    if (!isChainMode || !runtimeConfig) return;"

          },

            "text": "    const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = Object.values("

            "text": "    if (allProxies.length === 0) return;"

            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    // 设置组监听器，当有延迟更新时自动刷新"

          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    const groupListener = () =\u003e {"

          {

            "text": "    };"
          },

            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    delayManager.setGroupListener(\"chain-mode\", groupListener);"

            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    const calculateDelays = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        const timeout = 5000;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        const proxyNames = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "        debugLog(&#96;[ChainMode] 开始计算 ${proxyNames.length} 个节点的延迟&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        // 使用 delayManager 计算延迟，每个节点计算完成后会自动触发监听器刷新界面"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, \"chain-mode\", timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        console.error(\"Failed to calculate delays for chain mode:\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    // 延迟执行避免阻塞"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "    const handle = setTimeout(calculateDelays, 100);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "      clearTimeout(handle);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "      // 清理组监听器"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "      delayManager.removeGroupListener(\"chain-mode\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    };"
          },

            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "  }, [isChainMode, runtimeConfig, refreshProxy]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "  // 处理渲染列表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "  const renderList: IRenderItem[] = useMemo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": ";"

            "text": ";"

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "export const ProxyGroups = "

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "  // 测全部延迟（使用配置里的 timeout）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "  const handleCheckAll = useLockFn(async (groupName: string) =\u003e {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 423,

            "text": "    // 标记手动测速，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "    // 测速时清空该组的手动选择（对齐安卓端：后端会调用 ClearManualSelection）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "    if (current) {"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "      if (next.length !== (current.selected ?? []).length) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "        patchCurrent({ selected: next }).catch(() =\u003e {});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "    const group = availableGroups.find("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "      (g: IProxyGroupItem) =\u003e g.name === groupName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438,
            "text": "    const timeout = group?.timeout ?? 5000;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "    const proxies = renderList"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "      .filter("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "        (e) =\u003e e.group?.name === groupName \u0026\u0026 (e.type === 2 || e.type === 4),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "      )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "      .filter(Boolean);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "    debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 找到代理数量: ${proxies.length}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "    const providers = new Set(proxies.map((p) =\u003e p!.provider!).filter(Boolean));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "    if (providers.size) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "      debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 发现提供者，数量: ${providers.size}&#96;);"

          {

            "text": "      Promise.allSettled("

          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "      ).then(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "    const names = proxies.filter((p) =\u003e !p!.provider).map((p) =\u003e p!.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "    debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 过滤后需要测试的代理数量: ${names.length}&#96;);"

          {
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "    const url = delayManager.getUrl(groupName);"

            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,

          {

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "export const CurrentProxyCard = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 592
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 593
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "  // 全局模式下下拉框以 core 的当前节点为准，保证始终高亮正在使用的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595,
            "text": "  const proxySelectValue ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596,
            "text": "    isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 597,
            "text": "      ? (proxies.global.now || state.selection.proxy || \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 598,
            "text": "      : state.selection.proxy;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 599
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 600,
            "text": "  // 获取当前节点的延迟（增加非空校验）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 601,
            "text": "  const currentDelay ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 602,
            "text": "    currentProxy \u0026\u0026 state.selection.group"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 603,
            "text": "      ? delayManager.getDelayFix(currentProxy, state.selection.group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 604,
            "text": "      : -1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 605
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 606,
            "text": "  // 信号图标（增加非空校验）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 607,
            "text": "  const signalInfo ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 608,
            "text": "    currentProxy \u0026\u0026 state.selection.group"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 609,
            "text": "      ? getSignalIcon(currentDelay)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "text": "      : { icon: \u003cSignalNone /\u003e, text: \"未初始化\", color: \"text.secondary\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 611
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 612,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "const handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {"

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "for (let groupIndex = 0; groupIndex \u003c groups.length; groupIndex++) {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "        try {"

            "text": "          // 如果不是第一个组，尝试复用第一个组的测试结果"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "          if (groupIndex \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 firstGroupName) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "            let reusedCount = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,

          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,

          },

            "lineNumber": 106,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "              if (firstGroupResult \u0026\u0026 firstGroupResult.delay !== -1 \u0026\u0026 firstGroupResult.delay !== -2) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "                // 复用第一个组的结果，直接设置到当前组"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "                delayManager.setDelay("
          },

            "lineNumber": 110,

          },
          {

            "text": "                  firstGroupResult.delay,"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "                );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "                reusedCount++;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "                debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "                  &#96;[CloseAll] Reused delay result for ${proxyName}: ${firstGroupResult.delay}ms (from group ${firstGroupName})&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "                );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "              } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "                // 第一个组没有结果，需要测试"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "                proxiesToTest.push(proxyName);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "              }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "            debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "              &#96;[CloseAll] Group ${group.name}: reused ${reusedCount}/${groupProxyNames.length} results from first group&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "            );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "            // 只测试第一个组没有结果的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            if (proxiesToTest.length \u003e 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "              debugLog("

          {
